code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
let nums2 = parse_line(line2)

mut combined: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(nums1)
  match list.get(nums1, i)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
mut j = 0
while j < list.len(nums2)
  match list.get(nums2, j)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut output = ""
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut running = true
while running
  mut found = false
  mut smallest = 0
  mut k = 0
  while k < list.len(combined)
    match list.get(combined, k)
    when Some(v)
      if not have_prev or v > prev
        if not found
          smallest = v
          found = true
        else if v < smallest
          smallest = v
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  if not found
    running = false
  else
    if have_prev
      output = "#{output} #{smallest}"
    else
      output = "#{smallest}"
    end
    prev = smallest
    have_prev = true
  end
end

println(output)

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if string.len(token) > 0
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(token) > 0
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end
